mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.shuiguo_order_uuid_number as shuiguoOrderUuidNumber ,a.address_id as addressId ,a.shuiguo_id as shuiguoId ,a.yonghu_id as yonghuId ,a.buy_number as buyNumber ,a.shuiguo_order_true_price as shuiguoOrderTruePrice ,a.guoyuan_order_courier_name as guoyuanOrderCourierName ,a.guoyuan_order_courier_number as guoyuanOrderCourierNumber ,a.shuiguo_order_types as shuiguoOrderTypes ,a.insert_time as insertTime ,a.create_time as createTime
